rationale: Educ. Code §48.102 governs special education allotments based on basic allotment and instructional arrangement weights. It does not reference homestead exemptions or local property tax values. No operative provision requires amendment.
quote: For each student in average daily attendance in a special education program under Subchapter A, Chapter 29, in a mainstream instructional arrangement, a school district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the basic allotment
_note: No direct conflict. §48.102 formulas depend on basic allotment and ADA weights, not on homestead exemption levels. Any fiscal impact would flow through broader school finance formulas outside this section.
